title: Practical Application
description: Master Helvant believes magic should serve the people. He's arranged for you to help villagers around Dalhurst using your newly-learned spells. Prove that you can apply magic to real-world problems, not just combat.

objectives.description: Use fire magic to light the harbor beacon in Dalhurst
objectives.notes: Beacon for guiding ships - player uses fire spell to light it

objectives.description: Purify the contaminated well water in Thornfield
objectives.notes: Well has been tainted - requires arcane purification ritual

objectives.description: Magically move the fallen tree blocking the road to Crossroads
objectives.notes: Large tree blocks the road - telekinesis or earth magic needed

objectives.description: Defeat the bandit group threatening travelers near Crossroads
objectives.notes: Combat test - must use magic against real threats

objectives.description: Report your successes to Master Helvant

notes: Third quest - mix of utility magic and combat. Shows the player helping communities with magic. Rewards Ice Shard spell and a minor enchanted amulet (+5 arcana).
